sizing_rule.note: Portfolio allocation weights derived from optimal f concept (Vince): Toxico 53.45%, Incubeast 25.53%, LA Garb 21.02%. Specific optimal_f, kelly_fraction, and max_drawdown_tolerance values not disclosed by author.

source_rule_text: Allocate portfolio capital across multiple instruments using optimal weights derived from their historical performance characteristics to maximize risk-adjusted returns.
